race.comment: Another race choc full of chances. OXIDIZE (12) is heading the right way, turning in a much improved run for a close-up fourth at second run back. Fitter again and back a class. Looks ready and tough to beat. WALTZING MATILDA (6) was a maiden winner two back then went to 1400m latest and was a three length fifth. Kept fresh and back in trip. Will camp just off the leaders off the good draw and will be strong late. TOO MUCH TOO SOON (8) is going well and off the mark with a determined maiden win latest. Tricky gate but can go on with it. DIZZ BOOGIE TIME (4) was sound on debut then scored the maiden latest. Has more upside than most and with any luck from the draw can measure up again. DINA TYCOON (7) is another racing well and fresh for this is among the main hopes on best figures.
